original_title: NSSTL-032 Married Woman Waka Waka Ninomiya Playing With Her Husband's Boss
overview: A husband who can work. On the other hand, he was hated by his boss. One day, her husband makes a serious mistake at work. If the mistake cannot be avoided, the husband will get fired. The boss asked Dashi for his wife's body.
